name: Cranberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the flour, 1/4 cup sugar, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a small bowl, combine the egg, butter/sour milk, and oil; blend well.
3. Add the mixture from step 2 to the dry ingredients in the bowl from step 1, stirring just enough to moisten.
4. Stir together the cranberries and 1/2 cup sugar.
5. Mix the cranberry mixture into the batter.
6. Spoon the batter into greased muffin pan cups, filling them about 2/3 full.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 400 degrees F for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Serve hot with butter and homemade jelly or jam.
